tweets.text:
Stock Market Crashes at Highs
- **1929 Crash**: Dow peaked Sept 1929; fell 89% in Great Depression due to speculation, margin debt.
- **Black Monday 1987**: S&P at postwar P/E high; 22% single-day drop from program trading, overvaluation.
- **Dot-Com Bust 2000-2002**: Nasdaq hit Mar 2000 peak; 78% decline from tech bubble burst.
- **2008 Financial Crisis**: S&P peaked Oct 2007; 57% drop from housing collapse, leverage.
- **COVID-19 Crash 2020**: Feb 2020 all-time high; 34% plunge in weeks from pandemic lockdowns.
- **2025 Tariff Crash**: S&P peaked pre-Apr 2025; 16%+ drop from Trump's global tariffs.

### Bitcoin Crashes at Highs
- **2011 Mt. Gox Hack**: Jun peak ~$32; 99% flash crash from exchange theft.
- **2013 Bubble Burst**: Dec peak ~$1,150; 80% drop to $200 from speculation, Silk Road shutdown.
- **2017-2018 Crypto Winter**: Dec peak ~$20,000; 84% decline to $3,200 from hype, regulations, hacks.
- **2021 China Ban**: May peak ~$64,000; 54% fall to $29,000 from mining crackdown.
- **2022 Terra/FTX Collapse**: Nov 2021 peak ~$69,000; 77% drop to $15,500 from stablecoin fail, exchange bankruptcy.
- **2024-2025 Post-ATH Dip**: Oct 2025 peak ~$126,000; 30%+ pullback from leverage liquidations, ETF outflows, tariffs.
